Home/Blog/Madrid Protocol vs Direct Filing in China: Which Path Is Right for You? | RTMCN

Madrid Protocol vs Direct Filing in China: Which Path Is Right for You? | RTMCN

⚡

Key Takeaway

Madrid is useful for multi-country expansion, but many brands filing specifically for China get cleaner control, clearer timelines, and fewer handoffs with direct CNIPA filing.

Madrid advantageMulti-country coverage from one application
Direct advantageChina-specific control and fewer translation layers
Best for most RTMCN clientsDirect filing first, then expand via Madrid if needed

In This Article
